description: An encumbrance created when a PO is issued: it reduces the budget's available amount and increases its committed amount, reserving funds against a specific order. Relieved at goods receipt or invoice, moving the value from committed to actual (partial GR relieves pro-rata). Build-new finance control: it is the natural GL integration point and the mechanism that prevents a second PO from spending already-reserved funds (axiom A4).

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Commitment Ref.
fields.validation: configurable pattern; unique; immutable once created
fields.purpose: Stable key that ties the encumbrance to its budget and PO so the commit and the later relief postings (and the GL integration) trace to one record.

fields.name: budgetId
fields.label: Budget
fields.validation: Budget exists for the PO's cost-center/period; read-only after creation
fields.purpose: Links the encumbrance to the budget it reserves against so the commit reduces that budget's available and increases its committed, and the relief moves committed to actual on the same budget.

fields.name: poId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.validation: PO exists; the encumbrance is created at PO issue (the hard-commit point); read-only after creation
fields.purpose: Links the encumbrance to the order that reserved the funds so relief is triggered by that PO's GR/invoice and a returned quantity reverses the relief for that order.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; the amount is the PO value in base currency for the guard comparison
fields.purpose: The currency the encumbrance is posted in; the amount is normalized to base so the over-commitment guard compares like with like (axiom A12).

fields.name: amount
fields.label: Committed Amount
fields.purpose: The value encumbered against the budget at PO issue; the amount subtracted from available and added to committed, and the basis the relief draws down as goods/invoices arrive.

fields.name: relievedAmount
fields.label: Relieved Amount
fields.validation: >= 0 AND <= amount; increased pro-rata at each GR/invoice relief; reversed for a returned quantity
fields.purpose: The portion of the encumbrance already moved to actual as goods were received or invoiced; drives the status from committed toward relieved and supports partial relief for partial GR.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: committed (at PO issue) -> partially-relieved (partial GR/invoice) -> relieved (fully relieved when relievedAmount == amount)
fields.purpose: The lifecycle of the encumbrance: committed when funds are reserved, partially-relieved as goods/invoices arrive, relieved once fully consumed. Drives open-commitment vs actual reporting and whether funds are still reserved.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.label: Committed At
fields.purpose: Timestamps when the funds were encumbered; the posting date for the GL integration and the start of the commit-to-relief timeline.

fields.name: relievedAt
fields.label: Relieved At
fields.validation: set when the encumbrance is fully relieved; immutable thereafter
fields.purpose: Timestamps full relief for the audit trail and to confirm the reserved funds were converted to actual spend and freed from open commitment.

invariants: A4 commitment created (encumbrance) at PO issue, relieved to actual at GR/invoice; approval limits are not budget control
commit: available -= amount, committed += amount; relief: committed -= relief, actual += relief (available unchanged at relief)
partial GR relieves pro-rata; returned quantity reverses the relief
commitment posting is the GL integration point
A13 audit + SSE on every posting
